note: Mon+Thu 6:00 — the sole content batch. Keep one batch cadence; don't schedule the granular agents alongside it.
Approval-reply polling through the day (daytime only) — these slots cover reply latency without a resident process.
Sundays 16:00 — weekly report + experiment scoring + spawn-signal check.
Weekly brand-voice maintainer: keeps the voice spec fresh and scans recent output for drift.
